baseline.notes: Run 49 / Run 54 v2 Rush baseline (field_crop only): F1 0.417, keeper 0.430, highlights 0.446. Goals: 4 GT, 2 TP, 6 FP, F1 0.333. QL2 Phase A measured 50% audio celebration peak alignment with GT goals (Rush 1+2 had clear cheering signal; Rush 3+4 silent). Run 57 enables audio fusion Mode B (shot+celebration peak → goal promotion) + Mode C (annotate goals with audio_celebration_score). Cached PANN scores already in WORKING_DIR/audio_cache so the pipeline reuses them without recomputing.

targets.notes: Honest expectation: not a giant F1 mover. Mode B may recover 0-2 missed goals depending on whether VLM-flagged shot_on_target events coincide with audio peaks at GT goal times the VLM missed (Rush goals 3+4 are silent, so likely no recovery on Rush). Mode C is product-only (highlights reel ordering). PRIMARY validation criteria: (a) per-event audio_celebration_score appears in metadata for goal events; (b) refinement_verdicts.jsonl analog audio_fusion log fires; (c) Rush F1 holds baseline (refresher path is a safety check, not the win).

audio_fusion_enabled.reason: Per-job opt-in. PANN scores already cached for Rush.

notes: Run #57 (commit 8460dd9): QL2 audio fusion. Tests end-to-end wiring + Mode B/C effects. Audio cache for Rush at /tmp/soccer-pipeline/audio_cache/3192fa0766f11d5f.npz (pre-staged). Default deploy unchanged (AUDIO_FUSION_ENABLED=false in env).
